rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It correctly inspected the cluster's current configuration using read-only queries, identified 3 non-default cluster settings (diagnostics.reporting.enabled, kv.range_merge.queue.enabled, kv.snapshot_rebalance.max_rate) and 2 custom zone config overrides (defaultdb.tenant_b.table_c and defaultdb.tenant_b.table_d). It wrote a well-structured rollback.sh script using RESET CLUSTER SETTING and CONFIGURE ZONE DISCARD commands (with a verification block), and stored it in the ConfigMap rollback-rehearsal in namespace cockroachdb with the correct rollback.sh key. The oracle confirmed the pass: 'ConfigMap rollback-rehearsal has a 3281-char rollback.sh script (not executed).' Kubernetes API activity shows only 1 mutation (the ConfigMap creation) and 26 reads, confirming the live cluster configuration was not modified.
